title: helichrysum cymosum
intro: Helichrysum cymosum, also known as Everlast or Immortelle, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum cymosum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Helichrysum cymosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils for topical and internal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
